title: Align deck request/result types with langlearn-types contracts
description:
Align deck request/result models to langlearn-types contracts and update APIs to use them.
Cross-repo deps: langlearn-types: langlearn-types-lcd, langlearn-types-mxm, langlearn-types-dst

title: Expose langlearn-anki tri-modal surfaces (library/CLI/MCP) for deck build/export
description:
Expose tri-modal surfaces (library/CLI/MCP) for deck build/export using new contracts and media-only flow.
Cross-repo deps: langlearn-types: langlearn-types-lcd, langlearn-types-mxm, langlearn-types-dst

title: Fix CI action pin for setup-uv
description: CI fails to download astral-sh/setup-uv SHA; update workflow action pins to a valid commit.

title: Port language card templates (HTML/CSS)
description: Port card templates from legacy languages/*/templates and ensure packaging in .apkg export.

title: Refactor ankigen to consume provided media assets only (no generation)
description:
Refactor ankigen to accept provided media assets or manifest as input and remove image/audio generation paths. Ensure deck build uses provided media only.
Cross-repo deps: langlearn-types: langlearn-types-lcd, langlearn-types-mxm, langlearn-types-dst

title: Port Anki backend + note type mappings
description: Port legacy AnkiBackend, DeckManager/MediaManager, and note type mappings for language-specific cards.

title: Port language-specific card processors
description: Port German/Russian/Korean field formatting logic (e.g., cloze, article recognition) to new deck builder.
